signals.headline: SOL Price Tests $87 Resistance with $108 Target** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
SOL Price Tests $87 Resistance with $108 Target** | YES | HIGH confidence

SOL recovered above $86 and is testing resistance near $87–$89.75, with analysts identifying **$108 as the next major target** if momentum holds.[1] Support remains defended at the $80–$82 zone, with a weekly gain of 8.37%.[1]

signals.headline: Solana Holders Reach All-Time High of 167 Million** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Solana Holders Reach All-Time High of 167 Million** | YES | HIGH confidence

SOL token holders hit an **all-time record of approximately 167 million in April**, a 12% increase since October 2025, making SOL the fourth-largest held Layer 1 token.[3] However, this growth has occurred despite $18.2 billion in recent capital outflows.[3]
